name: athenaeum
description: Streamlined dialectic skill pack for agent design, multi-agent reconciliation, fleet-wide attestation, and code-aware agent-stack audit. Consolidates the grill-each-other patterns into 4 focused skills (design, reconcile, ratify, audit) with progressive disclosure, cross-agent runtime detection, and a unified CLI. The opinionated, quick-start path — use grill-each-other for modular composition.
